rationale: Acting on Review 1's finding (visible in diff lines 57-60) replaces the manual IsNilpotent 0 construction and `have`/`rw` indirection with `by simp [IsUnipotent]` (or direct use of the existing `IsNilpotent.zero`), yielding a shorter, library-aligned proof; Review 2's approve leaves this unnecessary reinvention in place, so the merged PR after Review 1 is strictly better on proof-quality.
